crucible-gauntlets.name: Gauntlets of the Forge Warden
crucible-gauntlets.description: Ripped from a Forge Warden's arms. They still glow faintly with furnace heat and tighten their grip automatically in combat.

ironbound-ring.name: Ironbound Ring
ironbound-ring.description: A band of starfall-infused iron that contracts slightly in danger, flooding the wearer with dwarven resilience.

crucible-vestments.name: Forgemaster's Vestments
crucible-vestments.description: Robes woven with threads of cooled starfall ore. They absorb heat and redirect it as protective energy.

starfall-amulet.name: Amulet of the Starfall
starfall-amulet.description: A crystal of pure starfall ore set in dwarven mithril. It hums with alien intelligence and amplifies magical resonance.

slagstep-boots.name: Slagstep Boots
slagstep-boots.description: Boots forged from cooling slag. They leave faintly glowing footprints and grant impossible surefootedness on any surface.

sentinel-shield.name: Sentinel's Starfall Shield
sentinel-shield.description: The shield of the Starfall Sentinel. It thinks. It reacts. It moves to block attacks before the wielder even sees them coming.

crucible-helm.name: Helm of the Living Forge
crucible-helm.description: A crown of cooled starfall ore that whispers tactical information directly into the wearer's mind. Disturbing but effective.

heartforge-blade.name: Heartforge Blade
heartforge-blade.description: A sword forged by the Crucible Heart itself — the only weapon it ever made intentionally. It burns with inner fire and grows sharper with each strike.

starcrown-helm.name: Crown of the Unborn
starcrown-helm.description: A circlet of crystallized starfall energy torn from The Unborn's brow. It grants alien clarity — the ability to see the structure of everything, down to the molecular level.
